notes: Strip the temporary diagnostic instrumentation that was added in v1.9.3 / v1.9.4 to triage the background-pause issue. Removed: the 'Diagnostic log' details panel, the diagLog function and its localStorage capture, all event-listener instrumentation (audio play/pause/playing/waiting/stalled/suspend/emptied/error/loadstart/canplay/ended, visibilitychange, focus/blur, pageshow/pagehide, lifecycle freeze/resume), and inline diagLog() calls in loadTrack / playPause / autoplay path / TTS lifecycle. Samsung-help section retained as ongoing user guidance.
